title: hypericum quadrifarium
intro: Hypericum quadrifarium, also known as Twinflower St. John's Wort, is a species of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family (Hypericaceae) native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as hyperforin and hypericin. The health benefits of Hypericum quadrifarium include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular herbal remedy. Traditional herbal preparations of Hypericum quadrifarium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support mental health, skin health, and immune function.
